hintDisplay: Sujeto: el sistema / Verbo: bloquearse (reflexivo) / Tiempo: condicional (si...) / Complemento: todos los datos importantes / Verbo: perder
spanishSentence: Si el sistema se bloquea, perderemos todos los datos importantes.
correctSentence: If the system crashes, we will lose all the important data.

hintDisplay: Sujeto: los desarrolladores / Verbo: lanzar (en negación, tiempo condicional) / Complemento: la nueva actualización / Complemento: a tiempo / Sujeto: los usuarios / Verbo: estar (tiempo condicional futuro) / Complemento: decepcionados
spanishSentence: Si los desarrolladores no lanzan la nueva actualización a tiempo, los usuarios estarán decepcionados.
correctSentence: If the developers don't release the new update on time, the users will be disappointed.

hints: Complemento: el nuevo sistema de software para ti

spanishSentence: Si llevas tu computadora al taller, el técnico configurará el nuevo sistema de software para ti.
correctSentence: If you bring your computer to the workshop, the technician will configure the new software system for you.

spanishSentence: Si instalamos este nuevo software, mejoraremos nuestra productividad significativamente.
correctSentence: If we install this new software, we will improve our productivity significantly.

correctSentence: If the app doesn't sync properly, you won't be able to access your files.

hints: Complemento: la última actualización de software

spanishSentence: Si no instalas la última actualización de software, tu dispositivo no ejecutará las nuevas aplicaciones correctamente.
correctSentence: If you don't install the latest software update, your device won't run the new applications properly.

correctSentence: If I scan this QR code with my smartphone, I will access the website immediately.

correctSentence: If the developers don't fix the bug, the application will crash.

correctSentence: If you update your software regularly, your device will run more smoothly and securely.

correctSentence: If I pair my smartphone with my smartwatch, I will be able to receive notifications on both devices.

correctSentence: If the system restarts, all unsaved data will be lost.

correctSentence: If the app doesn't update, you won't be able to access the new features.

correctSentence: If we share our personal data on social media, companies will use it to target us with advertisements.

correctSentence: If I stream a video in high quality, my internet connection will consume more bandwidth.
